test-case.name: Initialize_AfterDispose_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed. [AreaTargetPlugin] Cannot initialize a disposed tracker.

test-case.name: Initialize_CorruptManifest_ReturnsFalse

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Failed to parse manifest.json: JSON parse error: Invalid value.'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Failed to parse manifest.json: JSON parse error: Invalid value. [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Failed to parse manifest.json: JSON parse error: Invalid value. [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed.

test-case.name: Initialize_IncompatibleVersion_ReturnsFalse

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Incompatible asset version: 99.0 (supported: 2.0).'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Incompatible asset version: 99.0 (supported: 2.0). [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Incompatible asset version: 99.0 (supported: 2.0). [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed.

test-case.name: Initialize_InvalidPath_ReturnsFalse

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Asset directory does not exist: /nonexistent/path'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset directory does not exist: /nonexistent/path [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Asset directory does not exist: /nonexistent/path [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed.

test-case.name: Initialize_NullPath_ReturnsFalse

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Asset path is null or empty.'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset path is null or empty. [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Asset path is null or empty. [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed.

test-case.name: Initialize_ValidAsset_ReturnsTrue
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Incompatible asset version: 1.0 (supported: 2.0). [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Incompatible asset version: 1.0 (supported: 2.0).

test-case.name: Initialize_ValidAsset_SetsStateToInitializing

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Incompatible asset version: 1.0 (supported: 2.0).'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Incompatible asset version: 1.0 (supported: 2.0). [AreaTargetPlugin] Initialization failed: Incompatible asset version: 1.0 (supported: 2.0). [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed.

test-case.name: Initialize_AfterDispose_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed. [AreaTargetPlugin] Cannot initialize a disposed tracker.

test-case.name: Load_AbsolutePathInMeshFile_Blocked
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Path traversal detected in meshFile: '/tmp/evil.glb' resolves outside asset directory.

test-case.name: Load_DotDotSlashInMeshFile_Blocked
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Path traversal detected in meshFile: 'subdir/../../../outside.glb' resolves outside asset directory.

test-case.name: Load_FeatureDbNotFound_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Feature database not found: features.db

test-case.name: Load_FeatureDbPathTraversal_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Path traversal detected in featureDbFile: '../../secret.db' resolves outside asset directory.

test-case.name: Load_MeshFileNotFound_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Mesh file not found: optimized.glb

test-case.name: Load_MeshFilePathTraversal_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Path traversal detected in meshFile: '../../../etc/passwd' resolves outside asset directory.

test-case.name: Load_ResetsPreviousState
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset directory does not exist: /nonexistent [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset bundle loaded: test v2.0 (5 keyframes, feature type: ORB)

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset bundle loaded: test v2.0 (5 keyframes, feature type: ORB)

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset path is null or empty.

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Asset path is null or empty.

failure.message: One or more child tests had errors
Unhandled log message: '[Error] [LocalizationPipeline] Localization failed: Localization crash'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.name: RunFrame_PlatformThrows_ReturnsFailed

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [LocalizationPipeline] Platform update failed: Camera hardware failure'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [LocalizationPipeline] Platform update failed: Camera hardware failure

test-case.name: RunFrame_SceneUpdaterThrows_StillReturnsLocalizationResult

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [LocalizationPipeline] Scene update failed: Scene update crash'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [LocalizationPipeline] Scene update failed: Scene update crash

test-case.name: StopAndCleanUp_BothThrow_DoesNotPropagate

failure.message: Unhandled log message: '[Error] [LocalizationPipeline] Error stopping platform: Cleanup failed'. Use UnityEngine.TestTools.LogAssert.Expect

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [LocalizationPipeline] Error stopping platform: Cleanup failed [LocalizationPipeline] Error stopping localizer: Localizer cleanup failed

test-case.name: TrackingQualityThreshold_SetTo100_RejectsQuality99
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [LocalizationPipeline] TrackingQuality 99 below threshold 100, skipping frame.

test-case.name: RunFrame_LowTrackingQuality_SkipsLocalization
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [LocalizationPipeline] TrackingQuality 20 below threshold 50, skipping frame.

test-case.name: RunFrame_MissingMapEntry_SkipsSceneUpdate
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [LocalizationPipeline] Localization succeeded for mapId 999 but no MapEntry found. Skipping scene update.

test-case.name: ProcessFrame_1000Iterations_MemoryStable
test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [Benchmark] Memory delta after 1000 frames: 0KB [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed.

test-case.output: IgnoreFailingMessages:true [AreaTargetPlugin] Tracker disposed. [AreaTargetPlugin] Cannot initialize a disposed tracker.
